evidence: "Well done drama with an interesting story."
"This British comedy drama presents a very interesting look at life in a little fishing village in the British Isles."
"The story was easy-going and very well acted."
"A amusing and interesting story without a lot of unnecessary drama."
"Mildly amusing story. Drags a little at times."
"Very well written and acted. Always interesting in intriguing."
"The story contains a lot of funny situations as well as some fascinating drama."
"Their day-to-day struggles are beautifully documented by a British film crew."
"I think there was material there for a whole lot more."

summary: The user enjoys well-crafted dramas and comedies, appreciating strong writing and acting. They prefer stories that are easy-going and visually engaging, with a high sensitivity to production quality. Emotional impact is significant for them, as they express sadness when shows conclude.
